docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF REISING, RACHEL AS TO DEFENDANT KASEL, WILLIAM DBA TASTE LABS JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
